issues_found: Source is a press release announcing a research paper, not the full research paper itself - the generated record's event_type 'research_paper' is applied to the content described, which is appropriate, but source_type in the record shows 'blog_post' which is imprecise; this is a news/press release page
No quantitative figures are present in the source - all claims are qualitative findings from the paper announcement
Source is over 18 years old (2008), but topic has clear archival value as it predates the 2008 financial crisis and addresses repo market dynamics and leverage cycles which remain relevant
human_review_reason: Source is a press release/announcement rather than the full research paper, raising questions about content depth. However, the content accurately reflects what is available in the source and has clear archival value for understanding market structure dynamics around financial cycles and repo markets. Human review needed to assess whether the thin content (announcement-only) warrants acceptance despite high source trust tier.
